name: Transport & Logistics (EU)
description: Rail operators, logistics providers, airports, and mobility platforms across Europe requiring cloud-based fleet management, SAP TM migration, and sovereign data handling for cross-border operations.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CIO, VP Digital Transformation, Head of IT Operations, SAP Program Lead
drivers: EU Green Deal and digital mobility mandates
Cross-border data sovereignty for logistics chains
SAP TM / S/4HANA migration for logistics processes
Real-time fleet and asset management platforms

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on European transport/logistics IT spend

tam.description: Total IT spend by transport and logistics enterprises in the EU (~EUR 12B)

sam.description: Cloud, SAP, and managed infrastructure services for transport and logistics

som.description: Capturable share leveraging Deutsche Bahn reference and EU expansion

competitive_landscape: Accenture, Capgemini, Infosys, TCS, AWS, Microsoft Azure
